name: SMS Follow-up and Nurture Sequence
description: n8n workflow that runs every 15 minutes to identify leads needing SMS follow-up, send targeted messages based on lead status, and log engagement. Implements intelligent cadence to prevent spam and respect TCPA compliance.

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  l.id,
  l.external_id,
  l.name,
  l.email,
  l.phone_number,
  l.phone_country_code,
  l.lead_score,
  l.qualification_status,
  l.procedures_interested,
  l.estimated_budget_min,
  l.estimated_budget_max,
  l.timeline,
  l.timezone,
  l.created_at,
  l.updated_at,
  l.no_answer_count,
  l.last_contact_at,
  c.sms_consent,
  c.call_consent,
  COALESCE(pe.last_sms_sent_at, l.created_at) as last_sms_sent_at,
  COALESCE(pe.sms_count_24h, 0) as sms_count_24h,
  COALESCE(pe.pipeline_step, 'initial') as pipeline_step
FROM leads l
LEFT JOIN consent_logs c ON l.id = c.lead_id AND c.created_at = (SELECT MAX(created_at) FROM consent_logs WHERE lead_id = l.id)
LEFT JOIN pipeline_events pe ON l.id = pe.lead_id
WHERE 
  l.status = 'active'
  AND l.no_answer_count >= 1
  AND l.no_answer_count < 3
  AND c.sms_consent = true
  AND l.last_contact_at IS NOT NULL
  AND (NOW() - INTERVAL '4 hours') > COALESCE(pe.last_sms_sent_at, l.created_at)
  AND COALESCE(pe.sms_count_24h, 0) < 2
  AND (EXTRACT(HOUR FROM NOW() AT TIME ZONE l.timezone) BETWEEN 8 AND 21)
ORDER BY l.lead_score DESC, l.no_answer_count DESC
LIMIT 100;

item.description: Query for leads eligible for SMS follow-up: no answer on call, have SMS consent, within 4h of last contact, within daily/hourly limits, during business hours for their timezone.
Generate personalized SMS message based on lead score, previous attempts, and pipeline stage. Determine if SMS should be sent or escalated to email.
Check if SMS should be sent based on business rules.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pipeline_events (
  lead_id,
  event_type,
  channel,
  outcome,
  message_content,
  metadata,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE external_id = $1),
  'sms_sent',
  'sms',
  'delivered',
  $2,
  $3,
  NOW()
);

UPDATE leads 
SET 
  last_contact_at = NOW(),
  last_contact_channel = 'sms',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE external_id = $1;

item.description: Log SMS as sent in pipeline_events and update lead's last contact timestamp.

triggerTimes.description: Parse Twilio SMS response webhook and determine sentiment.

parameters.query:
SELECT id, external_id, name, email, lead_score, phone_number
FROM leads
WHERE phone_number = $1
LIMIT 1;

triggerTimes.description: Look up lead record by phone number.

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO pipeline_events (
  lead_id,
  event_type,
  channel,
  outcome,
  message_content,
  metadata,
  created_at
) VALUES (
  (SELECT id FROM leads WHERE phone_number = $1),
  'sms_responded',
  'sms',
  $2,
  $3,
  $4,
  NOW()
);

UPDATE leads
SET 
  last_sms_response_at = NOW(),
  sms_response_sentiment = $2,
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE phone_number = $1;
